recommendations.rationale: Tencent is holding up better than other internet-platform names, but the setup remains below key moving averages in a risk-off tape.
evidence: Closed at 508.0 HKD, down 0.975% on the day versus average stock move of -5.284%.
Price is below both MA20 527.875 and MA60 572.125 with downtrend regime flag.
Volume ratio 0.816 shows no capitulation or confirmation despite price near the 60-day range low.
risks: Relative strength can fail if broad Hong Kong tech selling continues.
Trading near the bottom of the 60-day range leaves limited technical support evidence.
recommendations.invalidation: Upgrade only if price reclaims MA20 with improving volume; downgrade if it breaks below the 60-day low on volume expansion.

recommendations.rationale: Alibaba shows a high-volume breakdown at the bottom of its 60-day range, so risk control argues against new exposure.
evidence: Closed at 123.7 HKD, down 6.288% on the day.

Volume ratio 2.1492 and regime flags downtrend plus volume-expansion confirm distribution pressure.
Price is below MA20 135.7 and MA60 149.8583.
risks: Sharp selloffs can produce short-covering rebounds.
Internet-platform policy or earnings news could reverse sentiment quickly.
recommendations.invalidation: Avoid stance is invalidated if price reclaims MA20 on above-average volume and stops making new 60-day lows.

recommendations.rationale: Xiaomi is the weakest watchlist name today, with a large down move and expanded volume in a downtrend.
evidence: Closed at 33.2 HKD, down 8.59% on the day and at the session low.
Volume ratio 2.1176 shows selling pressure expanded materially.
Price is below MA20 34.14 and MA60 36.095 with downtrend and volume-expansion flags.
It is listed among the day's laggards in the market summary.
risks: Oversold rebounds are possible after an 8.59% one-day decline.
Consumer-tech sentiment could improve if company-specific news offsets market weakness.
recommendations.invalidation: Avoid stance is invalidated if Xiaomi regains MA20 and holds above it for multiple sessions with volume normalization.

recommendations.rationale: The broad Hong Kong ETF is the relative leader, but it is still below trend and showing volume expansion on a down day.
evidence: Closed at 25.56 HKD, down 0.776%, the best relative move among watchlist items.
Price is below MA20 26.165 and MA60 26.6027 with a downtrend flag.
Range position 0.0224 is near the 60-day low.
Volume ratio 1.6568 indicates expanded activity during the decline.
risks: Broad-market weakness may continue while risk_state remains risk_off.
Volume expansion on a down day can signal institutional de-risking rather than accumulation.
recommendations.invalidation: Consider improving stance only if 2800.HK reclaims MA20 and risk_state shifts away from risk_off; downgrade if it makes new lows with continued volume expansion.

recommendations.rationale: Hang Seng Tech exposure remains weak, with the ETF below both moving averages and near the bottom of its 60-day range.

It appears among the market summary laggards.
risks: Tech ETFs can rebound quickly if large platform stocks stabilize.

recommendations.rationale: The iShares Hang Seng TECH ETF is slightly stronger than 3033.HK today, but still lacks a constructive trend signal.
evidence: Closed at 10.29 HKD, down 1.625% on the day.
Price is below MA20 10.573 and MA60 11.3765 with a downtrend flag.

Volume ratio 1.041 is near average, showing no strong accumulation evidence.
risks: Hang Seng Tech weakness may persist while underlying internet-platform names are under pressure.
